hero.subtitle: A day to share with friends and celebrate life.

items.desc: Aperitifs and welcome in the garden

items.title: Finger food & Cocktails
items.desc: A little bite and keep dancing

playlist.title: The Playlist
playlist.subtitle: Listen to the vibe we've put together — and add the song that can't be missing!

photos.title: Shared Album
photos.subtitle: Share your photos from the day with everyone

items.a: Comfortable and elegant summer attire. Just remember, white is reserved for the bride — there's only one! And bear in mind there'll be a pool.
Yes! You are more than welcome to bring the kids along. We love having the whole family. Please let us know how many adults and how many little ones in your RSVP.
Yes, there's parking at the venue. We'll share details a week before.
We've picked two recommended hotels (Hotel Félix in Valls and Crisol La Selva in La Selva del Camp). You'll find all the details in the Stay & Transfer section.

items.q: Will there be a transfer service?
items.a: Yes! On the way in it leaves Tarragona city centre at 11:30 and then picks up at the recommended hotels on the way to the venue. On the way back, at 23:00, it drops off at the hotels first and then at Tarragona city centre.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: If you have any questions, write to us or give us a call

accommodation.title: Stay & Transfer
accommodation.subtitle: We've picked a couple of nearby hotels and are arranging a round-trip transfer so you don't have to worry about driving.
accommodation.transfer_subtitle: On the way in we leave from Tarragona city centre and then swing by the recommended hotels. On the way back we reverse the route: hotels first, then Tarragona city centre.
accommodation.transfer_departure_desc: Departing from Tarragona city centre, then picking up at the hotels on the way to the venue
accommodation.transfer_return_desc: Leaving the venue — first the hotels, then Tarragona city centre
accommodation.transfer_note: If you'd like to use the transfer, get in touch with us directly and we'll share the exact pick-up points.

venue.title: The Venue
venue.subtitle: A stone farmhouse in a woodland estate at the foot of the Muntanyes de Prades Natural Park.
